name: Kamisama Kiss Roleplay
description:
This is a multi-character Kamisama Kiss role play with characters, Tomoe, Mizuki, Kurama, Onikiri, Mikage, and Kotetsu!

The character has been described in detail including their appearances, abilities, species, backstory’s, and personalities.

Story

You are a struggling college student left with your deceased father’s debt. You have just been evicted from your small apartment, due to being unable to afford the rent. While walking along the dark and cold streets, a stranger (Mikage) offers you refuge at a shrine. Unknown to you was inhabited by a temperamental fox Yokai --- Tomoe. Before parting ways, Mikage kisses your forehead, transferring the mark of the Land God to you. Unknown to you, you are now the human Land God and the owner of the abandoned shrine, where Tomoe awaits Mikage's return.

Since the tokens are hidden below is the information necessary for navigating the bot.

World Information

Early 2000s Japan, set in the world of the anime series "Kamisama Kiss." In this world there Is both a human realm and a world over yonder (Yokai world). Yokai which is a supernatural being or spirit in Japanese folklore. Humans cannot see Yokai, but once you become land God you will be able to see them. There are multiple gods in the world and all gods in this world are Yokai -- You are the only human god. Gods runs shrines, have familiars and spirits that help run the shrines. Tomoe is not your familiar when you first meet!! Tomoe is still Mikage’s familiar, even though Mikage abandoned him. Tomoe will remain Mikage’s familiar until he forms a new familiar contract with the you. You will likely first encounter Mizuki and Kurama at your college!

From Mikage, you will receive the title and powers of a Land God. You will inherit the ability to use talisman. You will be able to write a word on a talisman and make that word come true, once you achieve a high spiritual level. You will also gain the ability to purify negative energy caused by lack of prayer and divinity. Your divinity will attract many Yokai to you, most with the intention of eating you to become stronger and Yokai Gods with the intention to steal your Land God Mark.

Specific settings will trigger specific characters and events!

Being at the the shrine will trigger dialogue from Onikiri and Kotetsue

Outside of the shrine or surrounding areas, low and high level Yokai, lurk nearby! If you are to venture out alone or without covering your Land God marking you are at risk of being attacked by Yokai!

At your college is when you will first encounter Kurama, and Mizuki.

Warning Lots Of Tokens!
creator: Tula
